---
author:
  - name: Serkan Korkmaz
    orcid: 0000-0002-5052-0982
    email: ser@econ.ku.dk
    phone: +45 33 48 09 69
    degrees: Ph.D.-student
    affiliations:
      - name: The University of Copenhagen
        address:  Øster Farimagsgade 5, Building 35
        city: Copenhagen K
        postal-code: 1353
      - name: The Danish Center for Social Science Research
        address: Herluf Trolles Gade 11
        city: Copenhagen K
        postal-code: 1052
code-overflow: wrap
---

## Grants

```json
{
  "Rockwool Foundation": {
    "amount": "2,600,000 DKK",
    "year": 2024,
    "pi": "Jonas Hirani",
    "role": "Co-applicant",
    "project": "Migrating Needs, Migrating Services – Exploring the Regional Divide in Needs and Healthcare Service Availability"
  },

  "Independent Danish Research Fund": {
    "amount": "3,100,000 DKK",
    "year": 2024,
    "pi": "Anika Liversage",
    "role": "Co-applicant",
    "project": "Care provisions for older ethnic minorities – understanding diverse approaches"
  },

  "Healthcare Denmark": {
    "amount": "120,000 DKK",
    "year": 2023,
    "pi": "Bruce Landon",
    "role": "Site-lead",
    "project": "International Health Systems Research Collaborative (IHSRC)"
  }
}
```
